questions.q: Which AWS service provides scalable object storage?
questions.explain: Amazon S3 (Simple Storage Service) is AWS's scalable object storage service used for storing any type of data.

questions.q: What does IaC stand for in DevOps?
questions.explain: IaC (Infrastructure as Code) means managing and provisioning infrastructure through config files rather than manual processes.

questions.q: Which tool is used for container orchestration?
questions.explain: Kubernetes (K8s) is the industry-standard open-source system for automating container deployment, scaling, and management.
